message:
deps: bump criterion 0.5.1 -> 0.8.2

Major bump (two major versions). Breaking changes that affected this repo:

- criterion 0.6 deprecated `criterion::black_box` in favor of
  `std::hint::black_box` (stabilized in Rust 1.66; workspace MSRV is 1.85
  so this is always available). Migrated 8 bench files:
  ffs-alloc/benches/{batch_alloc,bitmap_ops}.rs,
  ffs-block/benches/arc_cache.rs,
  ffs-extent/benches/extent_resolve.rs,
  ffs-fuse/benches/{degraded_pressure,mount_runtime}.rs,
  ffs-harness/benches/{metadata_parse,ondisk_parse}.rs.
  Imports now split: `criterion::{Criterion, criterion_group, criterion_main}`
  + `std::hint::black_box`.

- 0.5 had already swapped lazy_static -> once_cell and atty -> is-terminal;
  no code here depended on those transitive deps.

- MSRV bump to 1.80 (criterion 0.6) is a non-issue; workspace `rust-version`
  is 1.85.

Verification:
  - rch exec -- cargo check --workspace --all-targets: clean, zero warnings
  - rch exec -- cargo test -p ffs-harness --lib: 312 passed / 0 failed

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
